# First Order Kinetics

**Summary**: A mathematical model used to describe the rate of degradation or reaction over time.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2019-alamran|AlAmran, 2019]] applied first-order kinetics to evaluate the biodegradation rates of PAHs and TPH in contaminated soil.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- All biodegradation from both PAHs and TPH were fitted properly (R2 = 0.93 - 0.99) with the first order kinetic equation. ([[2019-alamran|AlAmran, 2019, p. 107]])
